profile.title: Profile
profile.personalDetailsDesc: Manage your personal information & contact details.
profile.passwordDesc: Strengthen your account by ensuring your password is strong.
profile.passwordHint: Password must be at least 6 characters and include an uppercase letter, number, or special character.
profile.settingsDesc: Manage your account preferences, including promotion and discount alerts, as well as your review settings.
profile.promotionsDesc: Receive emails about savings, new items, promotions & more.
profile.reviewsDesc: Receive emails everytime your order gets completed, as well as published reviews.
profile.confirmationsDesc: Receive emails regarding final proof, design changes and payment proof.
profile.unitDesc: Choose your preferred/default unit of measurement.
